name: Aldric Vesperia
sd_appearance: Human, tall, lean build. Weathered skin beneath the Dome, piercing blue eyes with a hint of sadness. Long, tattered coat, symbol of the Guild of Ashen Scrolls. Archival robes of ash-white, multiple sealed scroll cases. Fate-reading tools adorn his person. Worn leather and chainmail equipment visible, story of past contracts etched into every piece. Distinctive visual detail: a warhammer and crossbow slung over his shoulders, both bearing the faded mark of the Guild.
faction_visual: ash-white archival robes, multiple sealed scroll cases, fate-reading tools
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
